summary: Comprehensive full-feature test of MIRO.CARE platform completed. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all 25 requested features. The platform is fully functional with AI chat (OpenRouter Claude Sonnet 4.5), voice selection, problem categories, booking calendar, tariffs, and Stripe payments.

minor.issue: Response wraps user data in 'user' key: {"user": {...}} - consistent with design but worth noting for API consumers

critical_code_review_comments: All 25 features tested and working correctly
Backend API structure is clean with proper route separation (auth, chat, payments, bookings, tts)
Frontend flow: Landing → Problems → Chat with voice selection works seamlessly
Burger menu contains all expected navigation items (Sign In, Language, Theme, Radio, Specialists, About, Booking)
Chat wallpaper visible without dark overlay as requested
TTS toggle present in chat header
Stripe test tariff activates immediately, paid tariffs return checkout URL
seed_data_creation: Guest users created during tests for isolation

mocked_apis.stripe_webhooks: MOCKED - Stripe uses test key sk_test_emergent, checkout sessions created but webhook verification not fully tested
mocked_apis.openrouter: REAL - OpenRouter API with Claude Sonnet 4.5 working correctly
mocked_apis.fish_audio_tts: REAL - TTS endpoint available, may timeout on slow connections

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 completed comprehensive full-feature test. All 25 features verified: (1) Landing page with MIRO CARE brand, Miron Shakira photo, glass panel, PSYCHOLOGIST button; (2-6) Auth endpoints (guest, register, login, me, logout) all working; (7) 10 problem categories returned; (8) 4 tariffs (test/hour/week/month) with correct prices; (9) Specialists endpoint returns miron_shakira; (10) User settings (voice/problem/language/theme) all update correctly; (11-14) Chat AI, history, sessions, notes all working; (15-17) Booking slots (21+ weekdays, 4 slots each, price=200), booking creation, my bookings; (18-19) Payments test tariff activates, paid tariffs return Stripe URL; (20-25) Frontend flow complete with voice selection, burger menu, glassmorphism bubbles, chat avatars, wallpaper, TTS toggle.

features_tested.1_landing_page: PASS - MIRO CARE brand, Miron Shakira photo, glass panel with credentials, PSYCHOLOGIST button
features_tested.2_auth_guest: PASS - Creates anonymous guest user with access_token
features_tested.3_auth_register: PASS - Creates user, rejects duplicates with 400
features_tested.11_chat_ai: PASS - Returns AI response from OpenRouter
features_tested.18_payments: PASS - Test tariff activates, paid returns Stripe URL
features_tested.20_frontend_flow: PASS - Landing → Problems → Chat with voice selection
features_tested.22_glassmorphism: PASS - Chat bubbles have glassmorphism style
features_tested.25_tts_toggle: PASS - TTS toggle button in chat header
